calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust'S Title To Real And Personal Property
Off Calendar Nov-13-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Julia Butler for Petitioners/Co-Trustees.

The Court stated that there are allegations that the real property was taken out of the Trust only for a refinance transaction and that it has no problem with that, but that the personal property was acquired later in a different form. Ms. Butler spoke of her Client having spoken with her Mother when the Father died and stated that her Client believes it was their intent to have all of the assets held in the Trust. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust's Title to Real Property and Personal Property is granted as to the real property and denied as to the personal property. Ms. Butler will provide a form of order.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust'S Title To Real And Personal Property
Off Calendar Oct-23-2018 Continued To Nov-13-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
